info.title: VDV-261 API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. Published API scope focuses on standards-based exchange of transport and vehicle operation data.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for VDV-261 API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. The VDV-261 surface is positioned as a standards-based transport data exchange interface, which is primarily read and synchronization oriented. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Un-Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.
